title: Agents go wide, remix, and repeat
summary: Agent-assisted design begins with divergent, named directions and converges through documented human judgment.
guidance: Generate 6–10 materially different directions, record selection and rejection reasons, then retest remixes with realistic content and edge cases.
do: Keep a divergence board and decision log
Return to divergence when the concept is weak
dont: Accept one generated answer or cosmetic variants as exploration
verification: artifact review for divergent previews, decision log, and repeated evaluation
